targetPositioning: Do not position as a qualified Azure Solution Specialist. If applying, present as a business-to-technology translator with Microsoft ecosystem adoption and solution enablement experience seeking a customer-facing cloud adoption or solution specialist bridge role.
managerHiringProblem: Acquire and close large enterprise Azure opportunities while coordinating Microsoft and partner resources to increase cloud consumption.

top3SellingPoints.title: AI and digital transformation customer advisory
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Enterprise AI adoption, governance, automation, analytics, and license-value enablement

top3SellingPoints.title: Remove deployment roadblocks and drive customer satisfaction
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Production troubleshooting, operational handoff, issue resolution, and vendor coordination

top3SellingPoints.title: Executive relationship building and customer buy-in
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Produced adoption and licensing evidence for managers, leaders, Finance, Microsoft, and regional stakeholders

skillsToForeground: Build Power BI adoption dashboards for enterprise AI tools using audit logs, license data, user lists, and usage exports.
Design AI adoption KPI views that make enterprise productivity targets measurable by team, manager, and usage trend.
Document Power Platform governance practices covering environment ownership, connection references, licensing, and production transferability.
Take over and operate production Power Automate flows across HR automation, scheduled syncs, monitoring, and troubleshooting.
Microsoft 365 Copilot adoption analytics and license-conversion support
Power Platform solution evaluation and governance
Business-case-adjacent value framing through usage, adoption, licensing, and operational visibility
Technical handoff, deployment support, troubleshooting, and validation checklists
Automate recruiting dispatch by synchronizing Workday candidate and requisition data into SharePoint-backed Power Apps workflows.
Define provider-consumer engagement standards for internal API platforms and cross-team integration work.
Maintain production automation credentials and environment variables with documented renewal and publish procedures.
skillsToSuppress: evi-global-intune-rollout: Prompt Context Only and too weak for cloud-sales positioning.
evi-n8n-saas-workflow-automation-exposure: Interview Only and unsupported as professional production experience.
evi-existing-python-sql-pipeline-debugging: use only as technical-operations context, not cloud engineering depth.
evi-trender-buddy-gpt-eval-pipeline: avoid presenting as Azure infrastructure or enterprise cloud sales ownership.
claimsToAvoid: Azure architecture or production cloud infrastructure ownership
cvHeadline: Business-to-Technology Translator | Microsoft 365 Copilot Adoption, Power Platform Automation & Enterprise AI Enablement
summaryAngle: This is an enterprise Azure sales role, and the candidate does not meet its core commercial screening thresholds. The safest truthful angle is Microsoft ecosystem adoption and solution enablement across Copilot, Power Platform, AI governance, analytics, and operational deployment support, but the application should be treated as Avoid unless additional verified enterprise sales evidence exists.
